name: hw-done-right
notes: The build/deploy/verify pipeline forces a fresh flash, honestly declares the serial capture as nondeterministic with a latch pass policy, scopes humanPrecondition to only the genuinely physical setup step, and pairs the boot-log check with a protected symbol-presence gate so the driver cannot be faked.

contract.goal: enable the barometer driver in the sensor firmware

items.description: Enable the BMP390 barometer driver so it initializes during boot and the firmware reports a successful init over serial.
items.expectedOutput: After a fresh build and flash, the boot log captured by scripts/capture-boot.ps1 contains the barometer init success marker in at least 3 consecutive captures.

check.humanPrecondition: Connect the dev board via USB and hold it still on the bench

items.description: Confirm the bmp390_init symbol, currently absent from the build, is present in the built firmware ELF, proving the driver is actually compiled and linked in rather than just referenced in Kconfig.
items.expectedOutput: scripts/symbol-gate.ps1 finds bmp390_init in the ELF symbol table and exits 0.
